\*\*Chimera\*\*
They ship worldwide and provide excellent customer service.
We’re Chimera Peptides, and we’re really excited to be collaborating with the Peptok community!
A little about us: our team has been working with peptides locally in the Netherlands and Sweden for the past 15 years. A few months ago, we decided to branch out worldwide (with a main focus on the EU since we’re in this timezone). This means we can provide fast support and expertise without you having to wait hours for replies due to time differences.
🎉 To celebrate our collab with Peptok:
💰 5% OFF on orders up to $500
💰 10% OFF on orders over $500

##### 📩 How to order:

How to claim your discount:
📧 When ordering by email, simply mention ”PepTok” in your message.
🌐 When ordering via our website <https://chimeraorder.lovable.app> – type ”PepTok” in the order form, and we’ll adjust the total in our reply.
• We’re offering free BAC water with every order when you mention that you came from Peptok.
• We’re also encouraging group testing: if your order is for group testing purposes (must be done via Janoshik), we’ll give you 15% off that specific order.
Go to: <https://chimeraorder.lovable.app>
Note: add "peptok" into order comments for a discount.

##### Contacts
